entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress characterized by water deficiency

entities.name: DREB1A
entities.description: A gene that acts as a master switch to tackle drought stress

entities.name: RD29A
entities.description: A stress-inducible gene whose promoter drives the expression of DREB1A

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop into which the DREB1A gene was genetically introduced

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A physiological trait improved by the introduction of the DREB1A gene

entities.name: ROOT RESPONSE
entities.description: A positive root response induced by the introduction of the DREB1A gene

entities.name: GENETIC TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of genetically introducing a gene into a plant
